claim: No Stable, Markdown sanitization, upload transport, package-parity, or recorded manual Risk Class 3 claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: A labelled native textarea remains the source editor and form control; optional tabs, toolbar, region, output, status, and alert use bounded semantics.
semantics.naming: Visible label owns the textarea; toolbar and tab labels are visible; preview is labelled by its tab or field label.
semantics.roleOverride: Toolbar and tabs are applied only when their complete managed keyboard behavior is rendered.

interaction.keyboard: Textarea editing stays native; Ctrl/Meta+B and Ctrl/Meta+I run only with toolbar enabled and outside IME composition; toolbar arrows mirror in RTL; tabs remain explicit buttons.
interaction.pointer: Toolbar and view selection are explicit buttons; source selection is preserved after formatting.
interaction.touch: The split view stacks at narrow widths and native textarea selection/paste remains available.
interaction.speech: Write, Preview, Bold, Italic, and Link are visible targets.
interaction.switchAccess: The native textarea and optional explicit controls remain sequential scan stops.

formBehavior: Textarea name/form/required/disabled/readOnly behavior remains native. Controlled and uncontrolled source reset to defaultValue; pending paste adapters abort on reset and unmount.

preferences.forcedColors: Canvas, ButtonFace, Highlight, and structural borders preserve tabs, toolbar, editor, preview, error, and focus.
preferences.reducedMotion: View changes do not require spatial animation and all descendant duration is removed.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Split preview becomes one column; editor and preview own bounded overflow.

consumerResponsibilities: Use a maintained Markdown parser and sanitizer for untrusted preview output and enforce safe URL and raw-HTML policy.
Own pasted-file authorization, validation, transport, cancellation, retention, and returned Markdown syntax.
Localize labels and preserve a visible persistent error when an adapter rejects.
limitations: Preview output is consumer-owned and receives no Mergora sanitization claim.
File adapters do not upload by themselves; complete Risk Class 3 manual and distribution evidence remains unrecorded.
